headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -45.5)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 36% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 121 quotes, including 94 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious grievances today.
• Despite the high quote count, the frustration score dropped significantly from yesterday's much higher peak and sits in the middle of its typical range.
• Fears improved notably from yesterday while optimism remains deeply negative, showing little recovery.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
